overview: Mono Red Rally is an aggressive Pauper deck that leverages cheap attackers and pump spells to overwhelm opponents quickly. It relies on Goblin Bushwhacker as a growing threat, supported by direct damage and temporary stat boosts. The deck aims to establish early board presence and close games before opponents can stabilize.
win_conditions: Attacking with a pumped Goblin Bushwhacker
Finishing with Galvanic Blast for direct damage
Overwhelming blockers with Wrenn's Resolve and trample

keep_criteria: Hands with two or more lands and an early attacker
Hands containing Galvanic Blast for early interaction
Hands with Wrenn's Resolve paired with a creature
mulligan_criteria: Hands with no lands or only one land
Hands full of pump spells without creatures to target
Hands lacking early damage or interaction

early_game: Play lands and attack with cheap creatures to apply immediate pressure.
Use Galvanic Blast to remove early blockers or chip away at the opponent's life total.
mid_game: Cast Wrenn's Resolve on Goblin Bushwhacker or other attackers to push through blockers.
Continue attacking to grow Bushwhacker with +1/+1 counters while maintaining board presence.
late_game: Leverage a large Bushwhacker with trample to close out the game.
Use remaining removal to clear late-game threats and secure the win.

key_cards.name: Goblin Bushwhacker
key_cards.role: Primary aggressive threat that grows with each attack
key_cards.notes: Attack early to accumulate +1/+1 counters, then pair with pump spells to push lethal damage.

key_cards.name: Galvanic Blast
key_cards.notes: Use to clear blockers when needed, but prioritize face damage when the board is clear or you have a clear path to victory.

key_cards.name: Wrenn's Resolve
key_cards.role: Temporary pump spell that grants +2/+2 and trample
key_cards.notes: Cast on attackers that can bypass blockers or on Bushwhacker to maximize damage output in a single turn.

sequencing_tips: Hold up Galvanic Blast until you see the opponent's response to avoid wasting it on a trivial blocker.
Cast Wrenn's Resolve after the opponent declares blockers to ensure the pumped creature deals maximum damage.
Attack with Bushwhacker before casting pump spells to trigger its counter ability first.

matchups.advice: Apply constant pressure and use pump spells to bypass counterspells or removal.
Race efficiently by using Galvanic Blast on key threats and pumping your own attackers to outdamage them.
Establish board presence early and use trample to push damage before they stabilize.
